executives.name: Gregory Hayes
executives.background: Gregory J. Hayes is the Executive Chairman of the Board of RTX. He served as CEO from 2020 to 2024 and previously as Chairman and CEO of United Technologies Corporation.

executives.name: Lanesha Minnix
executives.background: Ms. Minnix has served as Senior Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary since June 2023. Prior to joining Flowserve, she served as Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Ecolab Inc. from March 2022 to June 2023.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Counsel

board_of_directors.background: Gregory J. Hayes is the Executive Chairman of the Board of RTX. He served as CEO from 2020 to 2024 and previously as Chairman and CEO of United Technologies Corporation.
